_meta.title: Domain Maturity Pipeline Schema
_meta.description: 5-stage domain maturity model for CANON 318 domains

stages.name: discovered
stages.description: Domain identified, minimal description exists. Placeholder or stub content only.
stages.promotion_to_next: Add full .md with WHY/COMPARE/REQUIRES/STRUCT sections (minimum 4 of 7 standard sections)

stages.name: registered
stages.description: Full domain .md exists with structured sections: WHY, COMPARE, REQUIRES, STRUCT, FLOW, EVOLVE. Describes the domain's purpose, architecture, and evolution roadmap.
stages.promotion_to_next: Add embedded S7 VERIFY section with Python verification code achieving EXACT grade references

stages.name: verified
stages.description: Domain has embedded verification (S7 VERIFY section and/or standalone verify.hexa) with EXACT or NEAR grade. Verification includes CONSTANTS, DIMENSIONS, CROSS, SCALING, SENSITIVITY sub-checks.

criteria.grade_evidence: EXACT keyword in .md header/comments OR verify.hexa PASS results

stages.promotion_to_next: Link domain to 1+ products in papers/_products.json with section_id match

stages.name: productized
stages.description: Domain is linked to 1+ products in the product registry (papers/_products.json). Products reference this domain in their 'domains' array.
stages.promotion_to_next: Write and register a paper (papers/n6-<domain>-paper.md) in papers/_registry.json

stages.name: published
stages.description: Domain has 1+ published papers in papers/ directory. Paper is registered in papers/_registry.json and follows the Abstract+Foundation+Domain+Limitations+TestablePredictions+hexa format.

distribution_estimate.methodology: Full filesystem census of 318 domain directories across 10 sectors. File existence, section headers, grade markers, product registry, and paper directory checked exhaustively.

stage_1_discovered.note: ai-interpretability (no S7 VERIFY), chip-design (no matching .md, uses sub-files). Both lack the standard §1-§7 structure.

stage_2_registered.note: Domains with full §1-§7 structure but lacking EXACT/NEAR grade evidence. These have the structure but verification results are unclear or below [9].
examples: domains with no EXACT/NEAR/EMPIRICAL grade references in .md

stage_3_verified.note: Domains with full structure, embedded §7 VERIFY, and EXACT/NEAR grade — but NOT linked to any product in _products.json. This is the bulk of the corpus: well-documented and verified but not yet productized.

stage_4_productized.note: Domains linked to products (117 product-linked) minus those also covered by papers (68 with papers). These have product linkage but no dedicated paper yet.

stage_5_published.note: Domains with a matching paper in papers/n6-<domain>-paper.md. All 68 are also product-linked (verified via _products.json cross-reference).
stage_5_published.derivation: 68 domains with matching papers, all also in product registry

tracking_record_schema.description: Per-domain maturity tracking record. One record per domain.

files.description: List of key files in this domain directory

grade.description: Atlas grade: [10*]=EXACT verified, [10]=EXACT, [9]=NEAR, [7]=EMPIRICAL, [N?]=CONJECTURE, null if ungraded

products.description: Product IDs from papers/_products.json that reference this domain

papers.description: Paper filenames in papers/ covering this domain

verify_embedded.description: True if .md has embedded S7 VERIFY section

verify_hexa.description: Filename of standalone verify_<domain>.hexa if it exists, null otherwise

last_updated.description: ISO date of last maturity assessment

pipeline_operations.assess: Scan domain directory -> check files/sections/grades -> assign stage
pipeline_operations.promote: When criteria for next stage met, update stage + last_updated
pipeline_operations.batch_scan: nexus scan <sector> to assess all domains in a sector
pipeline_operations.gate_check: Before promotion: verify all criteria for target stage are met
pipeline_operations.report: Generate distribution table by sector x stage
